title: Triage framework-layer signals backlog (42 undelivered items)
perceive: Framework signal queue has 42 undelivered items with backlog stretching to 2026-04-05. Signals affecting taught patterns (wakeup, closeout, tender) and advisor lifecycle (realizer, gardener) are blocked pending review and routing decisions.
execute: 1. List all undelivered signals in lugs/bytype/signal/open/. Categorize by topic: wakeup/closeout (taught patterns), realizer/gardener (advisor lifecycle), tender (automation), other.
2. For each category, assess: does signal propose change to cross-spoke contract? Does it affect teaching? Does it conflict with recent deliveries?
3. For each signal: decide (DELIVER, HOLD-PENDING, SUPERSEDE, CLOSE) and record decision in signal file as decision_at + decision_reason.
4. Deliver all DECIDE-DELIVER signals to hub WAI-Spoke/lugs/incoming/ for coordinated release.
verify: All 42 signals in open/ have a recorded decision. Delivered signals appear in hub/WAI-Spoke/lugs/incoming/. Decisions are documented with reasoning.
acceptance_criteria: All 42 undelivered signals have explicit decision recorded
Taught-pattern signals (wakeup, closeout, tender) are prioritized for delivery
Advisor lifecycle signals (realizer, gardener) assessed for cross-spoke impact

completion_notes.perceive: Listed all 42 undelivered signals in lugs/bytype/signal/open/. Categorized by: taught-patterns (5), automation (3), advisor-lifecycle (1), fleet-pattern (12), track-lug (6), other (15).
completion_notes.execute: Applied triage logic: High-impact taught patterns (8+/10) → DELIVER. Critical automation bugs (9/10) → DELIVER. Advisor lifecycle (8+/10) → DELIVER. Fleet patterns (8+/10) → DELIVER. Pre-audited signals (delivered/superseded status) → CLOSE. Lower-priority signals → HOLD-PENDING.
completion_notes.verify: ✓ All 42 signals have decision_at, decision_reason, and triage_decision fields recorded. ✓ 14 signals delivered to hub/WAI-Spoke/lugs/incoming/ (taught-patterns, critical automation, advisor-lifecycle, high-impact fleet patterns). ✓ 12 signals closed (pre-audited, already delivered/superseded). ✓ 16 signals held pending (spoke-specific, non-framework, lower-priority tracks).
completion_notes.summary: Framework signal backlog triaged: 14 delivered (high-priority), 12 closed (pre-audited), 16 held (future processing).
